title: A Missing Millionaire: The Mysterious Disappearance of John Paul Getty III

scenes.text: A wealthy heir vanished, leaving a family in turmoil.
It happened in Rome, Italy, in 1973.
On July 10, 1973, John Paul Getty III was kidnapped for ransom.
Despite the ransom payment, he was released months later, but his fate remains uncertain.
scenes.label: FATE STILL UNCERTAIN

scenes.text: Follow because some cases still need answers.

description: 📍 Rome, Italy - 1973. John Paul Getty III was kidnapped for $17 million, yet his fate remains a mystery. Follow for daily cold cases!
